item.title: Silent catch blocks in evolve/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the evolve/ module is silently discarded. Every catch block either logs the error or re-throws it. Failures are observable without enabling debug mode.
item.description: 20+ catch blocks across the evolve/ module swallow errors silently, making failures invisible in production and in tests. Key locations: src/evolve/lifecycle/destroy.ts:75,126 (catch { return []; }), src/evolve/memory/preferences.ts:167 (catch swallows preference load failure), src/evolve/skills/stage.ts:174 (catch swallows stage setup failure), src/evolve/migrate/google-parser.ts:172 (catch swallows parse failure), src/evolve/tools/manifest.ts:31 (catch returns empty manifest). Pattern: these are non-fatal paths that return defaults on failure — acceptable, but the error should be logged for observability. Steps: (1) search evolve/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() or structured log call with the error and context; (3) for catch blocks in test paths, ensure test expectations still pass; (4) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep the fallback behaviour, just add logging. Scope: ~20 one-line additions across evolve/.
